title: The Casagrandes
desc: An 11-year-old adjusts to her new life living under one roof with her multigenerational Mexican-American family and over a market which serves as a gathering place for everyone in the neighbourhood.

title: SpongeBob SquarePants
desc: An accident-prone yellow sea sponge, who works in a fast-food restaurant, has adventures with his friends in the underwater city of Bikini Bottom.

title: Dora and Friends: Into the City!
desc: Dora and her friends live in the city of Playa Verde, go to school and work together to give back to the community, while having a variety of adventures.

title: Transformers: EarthSpark
desc: A new breed of Transformers must find their place among the Autobots, Decepticons, and the human family that adopts them. This new generation of robots, called Terrans, are the first Transformers robots to be born on Earth.

title: Transformers: EarthSpark
desc: A new breed of Transformers must find their place among the Autobots, Decepticons, and the human family that adopts them. This new generation of robots, called Terrans, are the first Transformers robots to be born on Earth.

title: The Legend of Korra
desc: Seventeen-year-old Korra hails from the Southern Water tribe, and must learn how to master the art of airbending. Korra soon learns that her quest will be more difficult than she first thought.

title: The Legend of Korra
desc: Seventeen-year-old Korra hails from the Southern Water tribe, and must learn how to master the art of airbending. Korra soon learns that her quest will be more difficult than she first thought.

title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
desc: Splinter is training a peculiar band of ninjas to combat an old enemy, Master Shredder. When they are in the surface world, the Turtles become involved in a conspiracy involving alien creatures, robotic droids and missing scientists.

title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
desc: Splinter is training a peculiar band of ninjas to combat an old enemy, Master Shredder. When they are in the surface world, the Turtles become involved in a conspiracy involving alien creatures, robotic droids and missing scientists.

title: iCarly
desc: Carly, Spencer and Freddie are back, navigating the next chapters in their lives and facing the uncertainties of life in their 20s.

title: WITS Academy
desc: Now that Andi's a Guardian in training at WITS Academy, the most esteemed school for Witches and Wizards in Training, it seems like her dream has finally come true, but can she live up to expectations?

title: The Loud House
desc: Ever wonder what it's like to grow up in a big family? Eleven-year-old Lincoln Loud gives viewers an inside look at how to survive the chaos of a huge household, especially as the only boy with ten sisters!

title: The Penguins of Madagascar
desc: A rookery of penguins with attitude in Central Park Zoo embark on what they see as a series of strike-force missions until confronting an unwelcome challenge to its dominance. The team includes leader Skipper, brainy Kowalski, loony Rico and young Private.
